svg.title: GEO optimization checklist card for blog content
svg.desc: A shareable checklist of 8 steps to optimize blog content for AI search citation, styled in Ozigi brand colors.
svg.text: GEO OPTIMIZATION
Content checklist
8 things that get you cited by ChatGPT, Perplexity and Google AI Overviews
Answer first, context second
Lead every section with a direct answer. Put the explanation after.
Use question-based H2 and H3 headings
Mirror how people actually type queries. AI matches headings to prompts directly.
Include verifiable statistics with source links
Cited content gets referenced up to 40% more. Vague claims get skipped.
Add a real FAQ section
Use Search Console queries to write questions people actually type. 40-60 word answers.
Use semantic HTML structure
Proper H2, H3, ul, strong tags. Structure signals hierarchy to crawlers.
Add an llms.txt file to your site root
Signals AI-readiness and gives crawlers a map of your content.
Check robots.txt is not blocking AI bots
Perplexity uses PerplexityBot. Blocking it = zero Perplexity citations.
Refresh key pages every quarter
Perplexity favors content updated within 6-18 months. Fresh = more citations.
Source: Princeton GEO Paper (ACM SIGKDD 2024) · Seer Interactive · Semrush 2025
OZIGI
